name: Grilled Orange Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Thawed frozen orange juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except the chicken. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Arrange the chicken in a single layer in a flat baking dish.
3. Pour the marinade over the chicken and turn the pieces to coat all sides.
4. Marinate for eight hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
5. Remove the chicken pieces from the marinade and place them on the grill, six to eight inches from the heat.
6. Broil for about 20 minutes on each side.
7. Baste with marinade during the last 15 minutes of cooking.
8. Serves 5.
